shows.metaDescription: Playlist About the show Crispy waffles, fresh-brewed coffee and an improvised comedy show on a Sunday morning! Wow! “Playlist” is a 60-minute, fully improvised
shows.aboutText:
Crispy waffles, fresh-brewed coffee and an improvised comedy show on a Sunday morning! Wow!
 
“Playlist” is a 60-minute, fully improvised show in English where every scene, character and joke is inspired by your favorite songs. No script, no repeats, just a brand-new music inspired comedy show served with waffle brunch.

shows.title: Hats Off!
shows.duration:
60 MINUTES (starting at 17:00)
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Hats Off! About the show Does the hat make the person? Join us for a day in the life of a colorful cast of characters, each shaped by their unique histories. Wh
shows.aboutText:
Does the hat make the person?
Join us for a day in the life of a colorful cast of characters, each shaped by their unique histories. What will unfold for them in this moment?
We’ll find out together as the show is created in real-time!

August 30, 2025 6.00pm

Drinks and snacks can be ordered from the bar

shows.title: Impram & Friends
shows.duration:
2 x 40 MINUTES (starting at 17:00)
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Impram & Friends About the show Join us for a beautiful fall afternoon of improvised fun! The Impram shows are alsways full of improvised original stories a
shows.aboutText:
Join us for a beautiful fall afternoon of improvised fun! 
 
The Impram shows are alsways full of improvised original stories and scenes. This time our fiercely creative cast is joined by a few select guests! It is a celebration of what improvisation is all about – actors walking onto a stage and creating something unique out of nothing.
Will there be laughs? Sure! Feelings? You bet. Something you never expected? Every time.
shows.eventNotes: Drinks and snacks can be ordered from the bar

Actual performance length may vary

shows.metaDescription: Marriage of Genres About the show What would happen if Luke Skywalker played poker with Billy the Kid? What if Al Capone found himself in the magical world of J
shows.aboutText:
What would happen if Luke Skywalker played poker with Billy the Kid?
What if Al Capone found himself in the magical world of Jumanji?
Perhaps you wonder what Dorothy and Toto would say to Dracula over a cup of tea.
Marriage of Genres might just let you know. You choose the genres, Impram does the rest!
shows.eventNotes:

August 31 at Fringe - This show will be played at Kvartersscenen 2Lång. Tickets are sold by Gothenburg Fringe Festival.
Drinks and snacks can be ordered from the bar

shows.title: The Ever After
shows.duration:
60 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Ever After ABOUT THE SHOW Have you ever wondered what happened after the hunter slayed the Big Bad Wolf? And was there more to the story about Snow White th
shows.aboutText:
Have you ever wondered what happened after the hunter slayed the Big Bad Wolf? And was there more to the story about Snow White than we have been told? As luck would have it, Impram knows what really happened and will make sure that you get the full story.
In The Ever After you will see a fully improvised version of your favourite fairy tale, that has never been told before and will never be told again.
The Ever After will be played at the Gothenburg Fringe Festival 2023. Follow the link for tickets and venues.

shows.title: Fragments
shows.duration:
60 MINUTES 17:00
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Fragments ABOUT THE SHOW Sometimes you’re not told the full story. Instead, you get to pick up the Fragments and either cherish them individually or try a
shows.aboutText:
Sometimes you’re not told the full story. Instead, you get to pick up the Fragments and either cherish them individually or try and fit them together.
Fragments is one long story, several intermingled short stories, or both at once as we get to know and follow the characters and their relationships through short glimpses into their lives.

shows.duration:
60 MINUTES 17:00
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Summertime ABOUT THE SHOW As the days are getting colder and darker, stay warm and cheerful by joining Impram on a beautiful summer day. In this fully improvise
shows.aboutText:
As the days are getting colder and darker, stay warm and cheerful by joining Impram on a beautiful summer day.

In this fully improvised show you will be transported back to summer, where birds chirp, the air is warm, and you feel cheerful and happy. Awww. That’s the life!
shows.eventNotes:
As the days are getting colder and darker, stay warm and cheerful by joining Impram on a beautiful summer day.
In this fully improvised show you will be transported back to summer, where birds chirp, the air is warm, and you feel cheerful and happy. Awww. That’s the life!

shows.duration:
2 x 40 MINUTES (starting at 17:00)
Actual performance length may vary
shows.venue:
5 May - This show will be played at the Dice Theater.
Tickets are sold through Dice Theater.
Dice Theater
Karl Johansgatan 62
41455 Göteborg
shows.metaDescription: A Night of Improv ABOUT THE SHOW Come and spend A night of Improv with us! Our fiercely creative cast will put on a show full of improvised and truly original s
shows.aboutText:
Come and spend A night of Improv with us! Our fiercely creative cast will put on a show full of improvised and truly original short stories and scenes. It is a celebration of what improvisation is all about – actors walking onto a stage and creating something unique out of nothing.
Will there be laughs? Sure! Feelings? You bet. Something you never expected? Every time. It’s A Night of Improv – every show is different, all shows are hilarious! Improvising without a plan or a script makes every show truly unique, so if you loved it once – come again.
A night of Improv is played in English. The show is played in two 40 min acts with a short intermission.
shows.eventNotes: Drinks and snacks can be ordered from the bar

shows.title: The Family Tree
shows.duration:
75 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Family Tree ABOUT THE SHOW Happy families are all alike; every unhappy family is a source of comedy. Based on this saying, The Family Tree presents comedy s
shows.aboutText:
Happy families are all alike; every unhappy family is a source of comedy. 
Based on this saying, The Family Tree  presents comedy sketches about happy times and horrible relatives. 
Would you like to see a new story about a beautiful girl and her evil stepmother? Or about conniving, treacherous lovers who preach hope and self-acceptance? Come for a fully improvised evening of family secrets, surprising gifts, and genuine laughs!

shows.title: The Fika
shows.duration:
60 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Fika ABOUT THE SHOW Fika in Swedish means a coffee break that is more about socialising than drinking coffee. Imagine old friends meeting for a fika at
shows.aboutText:
Fika in Swedish means a coffee break that is more about socialising than drinking coffee.

Imagine old friends meeting for a fika at a nice café on a lovely Sunday afternoon. Only this time, the stories they tell each other are seen in their full truth as our improvisers play out the scenes as they might have actually happened.

Impram invites you for an evening of revealed secrets, physical comedy, and witty quips!

Impram performed this show at the Gothenburg Culture Festival in 2019.

shows.title: Oh No! Oh Yes!
shows.duration:
1 HOUR 45 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Oh No! Oh Yes! ABOUT THE SHOW A perfectly normal life could turn into a disaster in the blink of an eye. When improvisation meets the forces of destiny, nobody&
shows.aboutText:
A perfectly normal life could turn into a disaster in the blink of an eye. When improvisation meets the forces of destiny, nobody’s safe. 

Come for a fully improvised cinematic experience, where people find humor in the most unexpected places and the world finds its new heroes!

shows.title: The Island
shows.duration:
1 HOUR 45 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Island ABOUT THE SHOW “No man is an island,” as the saying goes, but a close-knit community of people could sure feel like an islet. Impram brav
shows.aboutText:
“No man is an island,” as the saying goes, but a close-knit community of people could sure feel like an islet. Impram bravely travels to places where everybody knows everybody, no secrets survive, and no good deed goes unpunished.
Over the run of the show, we played stories about a competitive monastery, a royalist oil tanker, and a proudly clean festival. Where should we go next? The audience will decide! Like in any improvised show, the rest will be a surprise for everyone, including us!

shows.title: Passing Through
shows.duration:
2 HOURS
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Passing Through ABOUT THE SHOW Every day we go through a multitude of places, and every place can tell a multitude of stories that have happened there. Our tire
shows.aboutText:
Every day we go through a multitude of places, and every place can tell a multitude of stories that have happened there. Our tirelessly creative improvisers, inspired by an audience suggestion, bring those stories to live!
Impram invites you for a show where quirky characters are in abundance, hidden paths and surprising interior embellishments are plentiful, and eccentric relationships are the norm. You will never see familiar places in the same way ever again as you are passing through!
Impram performed this show at the Gothenburg Culture Festival in 2018.

shows.title: Maybe They Won’t Notice
shows.duration:
2 HOURS
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Maybe They Won’t Notice ABOUT THE SHOW The stage is set, the actors are well rehearsed, and the audience is eager! The premiere should have gone off witho
shows.aboutText:
The stage is set, the actors are well rehearsed, and the audience is eager! The premiere should have gone off without a hitch, but the night of the dress rehearsal, the entire cast was struck down by plague! But fear not—our plucky band of understudies has taken to the stage in their stead to give an astounding performance of… Wait, what was it called again?
Not only did they not learn their lines, they haven’t even bothered to learn the name of the play! Still, the show must go on, so our brave stand-ins boldly face every actor’s nightmare and take to the stage with every intent to make it up as they go along. Maybe the audience will see through it, or—by some miracle—maybe they won’t notice!
The show is performed in collaboration with Craic! Theatre Productions and Teaterhuset (Mölndal).

shows.title: Utopia
shows.duration:
2 HOURS
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Utopia ABOUT THE SHOW The world is already pretty good today, and if only we could fix that one thing, it would surely be absolutely perfect!Impram invites you
shows.aboutText:
The world is already pretty good today, and if only we could fix that one thing, it would surely be absolutely perfect!
Impram invites you for a visit in Utopia—the world where everyone is happy, no one is hungry, love is plentiful, and the sun is always shining!
What could possibly go wrong?..

shows.title: Improv Match
shows.duration:
2 HOURS
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: Improv Match ABOUT THE SHOW Two hilarious teams of improvisers face off in a comedy showdown! Fuelled by audience suggestions, our teams will work hard to pleas
shows.aboutText:
Two hilarious teams of improvisers face off in a comedy showdown!
Fuelled by audience suggestions, our teams will work hard to please the referee and the audience. Previously, our brave contestants survived weird taxi rides and upside-down handshakes in a battle of wits. Enjoy watching us challenge ourselves and others as our strict judge tries to keep us in check (wish him good luck)!
It’s an Improv Match – anything can happen (and probably will)!

shows.title: The Living Room
shows.duration:
1 HOUR 30 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Living Room ABOUT THE SHOW Join us in the Living Room, a show that starts with conversations among friends and inspires stories both funny and whimsical! In
shows.aboutText:
Join us in the Living Room, a show that starts with conversations among friends and inspires stories both funny and whimsical!
Influenced by an audience suggestion, the performers will start telling stories from their real lives, just like it would usually happen at a party in somebody’s living room. But suddenly these recounts would lead them on a wild ride of improvised scenes, each scene providing characters, jokes, and inspiration for further conversation.
Impram has debuted at Improfest Sweden in 2017 with this format.

shows.title: The Human Condition
shows.duration:
1 HOUR 30 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Human Condition ABOUT THE SHOW The Human Condition takes a look at what ties all of us together in this big, crazy world. We give the stage over to a hesita
shows.aboutText:
The Human Condition takes a look at what ties all of us together in this big, crazy world. We give the stage over to a hesitating couple on the eve of their wedding, an amorous nurse hunting the unwitting object of his affection, a free-spirited mother trying to stop her son from making the same mistakes she made during her years as a drug mule, and many more relationships—both intimate and casual, great and small. The show brings forward hidden fears, big belly laughs, and bittersweet tears that connect us all together.
Come explore The Human Condition with us, and let’s take a deeper look into what makes us human!

shows.title: The Global Stage
shows.duration:
2 HOURS
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Global Stage ABOUT THE SHOW Herzlich välkomna pour 演出! The show like you’ve never seen before! (In fact, all our shows are made up on the spot and nev
shows.aboutText:
Herzlich välkomna pour 演出!
The show like you’ve never seen before! (In fact, all our shows are made up on the spot and never repeat again). The Global Stage showcases our self-nominated experts attempting to speak dozens of languages and to not offend their very own cultures! What’s more, they still somehow manage to understand one another. Must be a miracle!
Impram invites you for a night of improv games and comedy scenes that will make you rethink languages, translations, and traditions in our multicultural world.
shows.eventNotes:

Knowing other languages might make the show even funnier for you, but is not at all necessary

shows.title: The Impram Show
shows.duration:
1 HOUR 45 MINUTES
Actual performance length may vary
shows.metaDescription: The Impram Show ABOUT THE SHOW The Impram Show  takes classic improv games to a new level! An incredibly diverse and fiercely original cast comes together
shows.aboutText:
The Impram Show  takes classic improv games to a new level!

An incredibly diverse and fiercely original cast comes together to celebrate what improvisation is all about. This show features the all-time audience favorites—from Movie in 30 Seconds to Play-Rewind—and dozens of new games to prove that the endless improv creativity never fails to wow a crowd.

Don’t miss out on Impram’s avalanche of comedy fastballs!

members.name: XQ Lu
members.bio: Meet our cast XQ Lu XQ dove headfirst into the world of improv in 2022, getting her start with Geneva's Murderet and Renegade Saints groups. Since then, she’s taken to the stage experimenting with a few long-form formats, from solving murder mysteries in "Murderet" , turning audience's favorite songs into montage in "Mixtape," and the fully improvised musical "No Day But Tomorrow." In the summer of 2024, XQ and her husband David (also part of Impram cast) went on a five-week Chicago adventure, completing IO Theater summer intensive course. After more than 150 hours of doing, watching, and obsessing over improv, they’re practically overflowing with "yes, and" energy. When she’s not on stage, XQ is either learning her sixth language (Swedish), hosting her Mandarin podcast "Convo Chinese," or making powerpoint slide in front of her laptop to make money to fund her improv classes 🙂 Hats Off! Performer Playlist Director
members.metaDescription: Meet our cast XQ Lu XQ dove headfirst into the world of improv in 2022, getting her start with Geneva's Murderet and Renegade Saints groups. Since then, she’s t

members.name: Lisa Sjögren
members.bio: Meet our cast Lisa Sjögren Lisa is a wearer of many hats, literally, and lover of stories who started her improv journey in 2016, and has since trained with Susanna Björnberg, Victoria Bang, Frida Sundström and many others. Some of her favorite things about improv are the shared laughter, on and off stage, the celebration of mistakes as possibilities, and the feeling that stories don’t have to be made up – they are already there, and you just need to grab onto them in the moment. She also has a special fondness for musical improv. When not doing improv, Lisa may be found making music in different constellations, dressing up to go to the opera, binge-watching comedies that make her cry, thinking about all the books she hasn’t read, or gazing at the ocean. The Impram Show Performer Marriage of Genres Performer A Night of Improv Performer Impram & Friends Performer Hats Off! Director, Performer

members.name: Stefan Freij
members.bio: Meet our cast Stefan Freij Stefan has been improvising since 2016 and has played with the improv ensambles De frimodiga medborgarnas sällskap and Hags änglar. He has trained with Agnes Edwall, Daniel Malmqvist, Peter Nordstrand, Anton Romanus, Tim Orr, Ignacio Grinstein, Josh Telson, Liron Levin among others. Stefan joined the regular ensemble at Impram in 2022. Stefan loves all forms of improv but is especially fond of short form and clown. He strongly believes that silence is golden when performing improv. When not improvising Stefan can be found training on juggling techniques or cuddling with his cats. Fragments Coach, Performer The Impram Show Performer The Ever After Coach, Performer Marriage of Genres Coach, Performer A Night of Improv Performer Impram & Friends Performer

members.name: Louis Lättman
members.bio: Meet our cast Louis Lättman Louis Lattman did his first improvised one-man-show in 1999 when he was eight years old. He studied improv at Second City Chicago and iO Chicago as well as Hoopla Improv and Free Association in London. Louis has trained with world-renowned improvisers and comics like Rachel Mason, Andel Sudik, Micah Philbrook, Michael McCarthy, John Hildreth, Norm Holly and more. While in Chicago, Louis performed with world-renown improvisers such as Jack McBrayer, Fred Armisen, Mike Obrien, Aidy Bryant, Vanessa Bayer, Horatio Sanz, all known from Saturday Night Live. Louis joined the regular ensemble at Impram in 2022. When not improvising, Louis may be found teaching improv, playing board games and reminiscing about the good old 90s. Summertime Performer Fragments Coach, Performer The Impram show Performer The Ever After Coach, Performer Marriage of Genres Director, Performer A Night of Improv Performer Hats Off! Performer

members.name: Christofer Wik
members.bio: Meet our cast Christofer Wik Christofer Wik has been doing improv in Gothenburg since 2013. He has trained with Daniel Malmqvist, Jens Norberg, Amy Cooke-Hodgson, Anton Romanus, Frida Sundström, Anders Fors, Tim Orr, Victoria Bang and many others. He was one of the founding members of the Improv ensemble Hags Änglar in 2015. Christofer joined the regular ensemble at Impram in 2022. He particularly loves doing long-form improv and strongly believes that the best way to learn life’s important lessons is through the art of comedy and utter nonsense. When he is not improvising, he is working to create a greener world by making the world’s ships pollute less. members.name: Tomas Falemo
members.bio: Meet our cast Tomas Falemo Tomas Falemo has been improvising since 2013. Tomas founded improv company Ouroboros, played with Paraphrase & PrimalImpro, and performed as a guest improviser at GbgImpro, Improverket, and Improcirkeln. He has trained with Anders Fors, Anton Romanus, Charlotte Gittins, Daniel Malmqvist, Frida Sundström, Gary Schwartz, Glenn Hall, Inbal Lori, Jason Geary, Jay Sukow, Joe Bill, John Pekkari, Keng-Sam Chane Chick Te, Laura Dorneveerd, Omar Galvan, Patti Stiles, Peter Nordstrand, Rama Nicholas, Robert Weitz, Shawn Kinley, Victoria Bang, Zaki Zikani, and many others. Tomas is part of the regular ensemble at Impram and often leads the drop-in improvisation sessions. He has a penchant for explorative long-form shows and unusual characters. When not improvising, Tomas may be found building translation boxes that let computer programs talk to one another. He believes that improv might save the world because it makes people listen more and fight less. Utopia Director, Performer A Night of Improv Coach, Performer Oh No! Oh Yes! sitePages.title: Join us
sitePages.body:
Join us

Open rehearsals

Have you always dreamt about trying improv and never found the right time? Or are you already a seasoned and passionate improviser that would love an extra evening to play with fun folks?

Our open rehearsal sessions are the opportunity for anyone to join one of Impram’s regular rehearsals. You get to do fun Improv activities and see what playing improv with us is like.

Open session dates are announced in our social media and on this page as soon as soon as they are planned.

Are there no session dates posted right now? You can still contact us and let us know your interest and we will put you on our waiting list.

If you wish to join a session, send us an email at impram.gothenburg@gmail.com to let us know your interest, we will get back to you about booking a spot.

Upcoming open sessions:
Wednesday, February 25th

Wednesday, March 25th

Recruitment

From time to time, Impram is open to recruitment of new members to the group. If you love improv, have some experience of it and would like to be in regular shows in English, then we would love to hear from you!

Reach out to us by sending an email to impram.gothenburg@gmail.com.

sitePages.title: About us
sitePages.body:
About us

Impram

Impram was established in Gothenburg in 2015 by a group of people from across the globe united by a love for improv and fun-loving spirit. As expats, they recognized that the best way to find good entertainment in English would be to create it themselves.

Over the years, Impram have been the home of a diverse community of people. Whether as audience members, improv players or participants in our open sessions and try-out events, we have a place for everyone who enjoys our values of openness, playfulness, and joy.

Today the group regularly stages longform and shortform improv shows. Additionally, we arrange open sessions where newcomers can come and try out playing improv alongside the members of the group. Our calendar always has something for you to enjoy.

What is improv?

Improvised theater, usually referred to as improv, is a performing art where actors spontaneously create scenes, characters, and dialogue without a script. Instead of relying on predetermined lines or plots, improvisers use creativity and collaboration to explore stories and scenes in real-time. This makes each performance entirely unique and unpredictable.

Our cast
Our shows

sitePages.title: Privacy Policy
sitePages.body:
Privacy Policy

Impram (“us”, “we”, or “our”) operates the Impram website (the “Website” or the “Service”).

Our Website follows all legal requirements to protect your privacy. Our Privacy Policy is a legal statement that explains how we may collect information from you, how we may share your information, and how you can limit our sharing of your information. You will see terms in our Privacy Policy that are capitalized. These terms have meanings as described in the Definitions section below.

Definitions

  • Personal Data: Personal Data means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession).
  • Usage Data: Usage Data is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit).
  • Cookies: Cookies are small pieces of data stored on a User’s device.
  • Data Controller: Data Controller means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data.
  • Data Processors (or Service Providers): Data Processor (or Service Provider) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively.
  • Data Subject: Data Subject is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data.
  • User: The User is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.

Information Collection

We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

Personal Data

While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address, Name, Address, Cookies and Usage Data.

We only use your Personal Data to contact you with booking confirmations, updates regarding our events, and other information that may be of interest to you if you use our Website and/or attend one of our events.

Usage Data

We collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol (IP) address, browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages and other statistics.

Cookies

We use “cookies” to collect information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service.

Use of Data

We use the collected data for various purposes:

  • To provide and maintain our Service
  • To notify you about changes to our events
  • To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so (for example, when booking tickets to our events)
  • To gather analytics so that we can improve our Service
  • To monitor the usage of our Service
  • To detect, prevent and address technical issues
  • To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about if you have directly subscribed to receive such information

Retention of Data

We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies.

We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for one year, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.

Transfer Of Data

Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to — and maintained on — computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ than those from your jurisdiction.

We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organization or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.

Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.

Legal Basis for Processing Personal Data Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

If you are from the European Economic Area (EEA), Impram’s legal basis for collecting and using the personal information described in this Privacy Policy depends on the Personal Data we collect and the specific context in which we collect it.

Impram may process your Personal Data because:

  • You have given us permission to do so
  • The processing is in our legitimate interests and it’s not overridden by your rights
  • For payment processing purposes
  • To comply with the law
Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

If you are a resident of the European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights. Impram aims to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data.

If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please contact us.

In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:

  • The right to access, update or to delete the information we have on you.
  • The right of rectification. You have the right to have your information rectified if that information is inaccurate or incomplete.
  • The right to object. You have the right to object to our processing of your Personal Data.
  • The right of restriction. You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal information.
  • The right to data portability. You have the right to be provided with a copy of your Personal Data in a structured, machine-readable and commonly used format.
  • The right to withdraw consent. You also have the right to withdraw your consent at any time where TermsFeed relied on your consent to process your personal information.

Please note that we may ask you to verify your identity before responding to such requests.

You have the right to complain to a Data Protection Authority about our collection and use of your Personal Data. For more information, please contact your local data protection authority in the European Economic Area (EEA).

Service Providers

We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service, to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform Service-related services or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used.

These third parties have access to your Personal Information only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

Payments

We may provide paid products and/or services within the Service (including but not limited to selling tickets to our events). In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors).

We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.

The payment processor we work with is Stripe. Their Privacy Policy can be viewed at https://stripe.com/se/privacy. Stripe uses Strong Customer Authentication (SCA), as part of the second Payment Services Directive (PSD2) in Europe, for processing online card payments between customers and businesses in the European Economic Area.

Security

The security of your Personal Information is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Children’s Privacy

Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 18 (“Children”).

We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 18. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with Personal Information, please contact us. If we discover that a child under 18 has provided us with Personal Information, we will delete such information from our servers immediately.

Compliance With Laws

We will disclose your Personal Information when required to do so by law or subpoena.

Changes To This Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

Last updated: September 9, 2019.
